decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010' already exists in the registry with source_id '2010_09_14_brt_1st2nd_cac5' already listed among its source_ids. The payload matches exactly: same project_name 'First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service', same status 'Phase I project launch: October 10, 2010', same description referencing M15 SBS, over 10 miles of bus facilities, and doubling protected bike lanes. The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no linking to another record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting #5
Adds over 10 miles of new and improved bus facilities
Doubles the protected bike lanes in New York City
